name: wushen-forge
description: Local-first AI modular 3D design workbench with a Weapon Concept Pack.

scripts.release:gate: npm run release:safety-scope && npm run release:secrets-files && npm run release:prompt-quality && npm run release:docs-walkthrough && npm run release:packaging-readiness && npm run release:license-sbom && npm run unity:import:gate
scripts.m2:gate: npm run contracts:check && npm run agent:check && npm run agent:m2-smoke && npm run desktop:typecheck && npm run desktop:build
scripts.m3:gate: npm run contracts:types:check && npm run agent:m3-llm-smoke && npm run agent:m3-comfyui-smoke && npm run agent:m3-image-dimensions-smoke && npm run m2:gate
scripts.m4:gate: npm run m3:gate && npm run agent:m4-migrations-smoke && npm run agent:m4-patch-smoke && npm run agent:m4-patch-http-smoke && npm run agent:m4-comfyui-patch-smoke
scripts.m5:gate: npm run m4:gate && npm run agent:p0-job-actions-smoke && npm run agent:p0-runtime-recovery-smoke && npm run agent:p0-provider-runtime-boundary-smoke && npm run agent:p0-local-http-3d-provider-smoke && npm run agent:p0-local-3d-runtime-wrapper-smoke && npm run agent:p0-job-history-search-smoke && npm run agent:p0-async-generate3d-worker-smoke && npm run agent:p0-generate3d-worker-loop-smoke && npm run agent:p0-export-unity-worker-smoke && npm run agent:p1-asset-reveal-smoke && npm run desktop:p0-runtime-handoff-smoke && npm run desktop:p0-job-action-state-smoke && npm run desktop:p0-job-center-history-smoke && npm run desktop:p0-context-continuity-smoke && npm run desktop:p1-deeplink-smoke && npm run agent:m5-glb-smoke && npm run agent:m5-generate3d-http-smoke && npm run agent:m5-export-unity-http-smoke && npm run unity:preflight
scripts.m6:gate: npm run contracts:check && npm run contracts:types:check && npm run agent:check && npm run agent:m6-structure-recast-smoke && npm run desktop:typecheck
scripts.r1:foundation-gate: npm run agent:r1-foundation-smoke && npm run m6:gate
scripts.r1:gate: npm run r1:foundation-gate && npm run desktop:build && npm run desktop:p0-context-continuity-smoke
scripts.r2:contracts-gate: npm run contracts:check && npm run contracts:types:check && npm run agent:check && npm run agent:r2-concept-contracts-smoke
scripts.r2:gate: npm run r2:contracts-gate && npm run agent:r2-concept-projects-smoke && npm run agent:r2-module-registry-smoke
